name: Post-Purchase Thank You
description: 2-step flow: immediate thank-you email, day 7 review request.

steps.subject: Thank you for your order, {{first_name}}!
steps.body_html:
Thank You!

Hi {{first_name}},

Thank you for shopping with {{site_name}}. We truly appreciate your business and hope you love your purchase.

If you have any questions about your order, don't hesitate to reach out to our support team.

Continue Shopping
steps.body_text: Hi {{first_name}}, thank you for your order at {{site_name}}. We hope you love your purchase. Continue shopping at {{site_url}}.

steps.subject: How was your experience, {{first_name}}?
steps.preview_text: We'd love to hear your thoughts.
steps.body_html:
Share Your Experience

Hi {{first_name}},

It's been a week since your order arrived — we'd love to hear what you think!

Your review helps other customers make confident decisions and helps us continue improving.

Leave a Review

Thank you for being a valued customer.
steps.body_text: Hi {{first_name}}, how was your recent purchase? We'd love your feedback. Leave a review at {{site_url}}.
